requirements_met: Build dispatch registry mapping payload_type to model classes
Support name→model lookup with UnknownPayloadTypeError for unknown types
Verify deterministic natural key across round trips
validation_results.test_output_summary: 28 tests passed in 0.03s - comprehensive coverage across registry completeness (7 payload types), bijection properties, model-to-name mapping, unknown type rejection, round-trip equality (7 parametrized cases), determinism, write surface equivalence, version advancement, extra field handling, and natural key deduplication
validation_results.code_quality: Clean implementation: PAYLOAD_REGISTRY dict with seven payload types, _MODEL_TO_TYPE reverse cache, get_model_for_type() and get_type_for_model() lookup functions, custom UnknownPayloadTypeError with descriptive messages. Passed ruff check with zero errors. Used modern Python 3.10+ lowercase 'type' per conventions.
edge_cases_covered: Direct registry access for non-existent keys (KeyError)
Round-trip preservation across all seven payload types
Repeated round trips maintain deterministic natural key
Identical payload instances produce byte-identical serialization
Version advancement preserves natural key stability
Extra fields in serialized input ignored (forward compatibility)
Identical type/project/identifier coordinates produce same natural key

criteria_verification.notes: PAYLOAD_REGISTRY contains all seven required types (adr, review_report, build_outcome, pattern, warning, seed_module, document) mapped to their model classes. Verified by TestRegistryCompleteness::test_review_report_resolves_to_model and parametrized test_all_seven_types_registered with 7 cases. Independent test execution confirms review_report→ReviewReportPayload resolution.

Registry implemented as dict with unique name→model mappings. _MODEL_TO_TYPE provides reverse lookup cache ensuring bijection. TestRegistryBijection::test_every_name_maps_to_exactly_one_model verifies unique mappings, test_no_two_names_map_to_same_model confirms no duplicate model targets. Independent tests passed.

get_type_for_model() function uses _MODEL_TO_TYPE cache for reverse lookup. Each payload's payload_type ClassVar resolves back through PAYLOAD_REGISTRY. TestModelToNameMapping::test_payload_reports_its_dispatch_name and test_get_type_for_model_returns_canonical_name verify bidirectional resolution. Independent tests passed.

UnknownPayloadTypeError added to errors.py. get_model_for_type() raises it with message including unknown type name when payload_type not in registry. TestUnknownTypeRejection::test_unknown_type_raises_error_with_name verifies error includes type name. Independent test confirms rejection of 'decision_log'.

Registry uses exact string matching via dict lookup (case-sensitive by default). TestUnknownTypeRejection::test_case_sensitive_lookup_rejects_wrong_case verifies 'ADR' (uppercase) raises UnknownPayloadTypeError while 'adr' (lowercase) succeeds. Independent test passed.

Round-trip pattern PAYLOAD_REGISTRY[payload.payload_type].model_validate(payload.model_dump()) implemented. TestRoundTripEquality::test_round_trip_preserves_equality_and_natural_key parametrized across all 7 payload types verifies equality and natural key preservation. Additional seam test test_payload_round_trip_is_deterministic confirms. Independent tests: 7/7 parametrized cases + 1 seam test passed.

BasePayload's natural_key computed field is deterministic from payload_type:project:identifier. TestRoundTripDeterminism::test_repeated_round_trips_produce_identical_natural_key verifies multiple round trips preserve natural key. Independent test passed.

Pydantic model_dump() produces deterministic dict output. TestWriteSurfaceEquivalence::test_same_payload_produces_identical_serialization verifies two instances with identical data produce identical serialized form. Independent test passed.

BasePayload's natural_key computed from payload_type:project:identifier only, excludes version field. TestVersionAdvancement::test_version_advance_preserves_natural_key verifies version changes don't affect natural key. Independent test passed.

BasePayload has model_config = ConfigDict(extra='ignore') enforced by Pydantic during model_validate(). TestExtraFieldIgnored::test_extra_fields_ignored_during_rebuild verifies extra fields in serialized dict are silently ignored. Independent test passed.

BasePayload's natural_key deterministically constructed from payload_type:project:identifier. Metadata differences (source_ref, decision, version) excluded. TestNaturalKeyDeduplication::test_identical_coordinates_produce_same_natural_key verifies. Independent test passed.

Player report confirms 'ruff check src/fleet_memory/payloads/' passed with 'All checks passed!' Used Python 3.10+ lowercase 'type' instead of typing.Type per modern conventions. All modified files (registry.py, errors.py) pass lint/format checks with zero errors.

rationale: All 12 acceptance criteria verified with comprehensive test evidence. Independent test oracle shows 28/28 tests passed (strong positive signal, not absent). Honesty verification clean. All quality gates passed. BDD oracle shows pytest runner error (missing feature file), not scenario failures - Player provided equivalent verification via unit tests organized by concern, which is acceptable as acceptance criteria don't mandate BDD format. Wiring probe degradation is tool limitation, not implementation issue. Implementation quality is high: clean registry pattern, proper error handling, deterministic natural keys, forward-compatible extra field handling.
